entries.source: data interpretation AI
entries.value: AI sa interpretasyon ng data

entries.source: Data Interpreter
entries.value: Tagapagsalin ng Datos

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Data Interpreter Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Paste data, chart descriptions, o mga resulta at Matutunan ang ano sila mean, ano sila gawin hindi mean, at ano magtanong susunod.

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Data Interpreter Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI: praktikal gabay

entries.source: Data Interpreter prompts and study loop
entries.value: Data Interpreter mga prompt at loop sa pag-aaral

entries.source: Dates and summaries matter, but learners often need a way into the human situation: what people believed, what choices they saw, what limits shaped them, and what they could not have known.
entries.value: Dates at summaries matter, pero mga mag-aaral madalas kailangan isang way tungo sa ang human situation: ano mga tao believed, ano mga pagpili sila saw, ano limits shaped sila, at ano sila maaaring hindi mayroon kilala.

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Makipagdebate sa anumang paksa, hamunin, ihambing ang mga pahayag, at matutong bumuo ng mas matibay na mga argumento.

entries.source: Debate causes and consequences
entries.value: Debate causes at consequences

entries.source: Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg
entries.value: Makipagdebate tungkol sa patakaran sa klima kasama si Greta Thunberg

entries.source: Debate helps you separate claims, evidence, values, and assumptions, which makes historical interpretation more precise.
entries.value: Tinutulungan ka ng debate na paghiwalayin ang mga pahayag, ebidensya, pagpapahalaga, at palagay, kaya nagiging mas tumpak ang interpretasyon sa kasaysayan.

entries.source: Debate justice with Batman
entries.value: Makipagdebate tungkol sa hustisya kasama si Batman

entries.source: Debate modes that help learners make claims, face counterarguments, and improve reasoning under pressure.
entries.value: Debate mga mode na tulong mga mag-aaral Gumawa ng mga pahayag, face counterarguments, at Pahusayin ang pangangatwiran sa ilalim ng presyon.

entries.source: Debate the claim
entries.value: Debatihin ang pahayag

entries.source: Debate the claim from more than one side so you can notice assumptions, tradeoffs, and weak evidence.
entries.value: Debatihin ang pahayag mula sa higit sa isang panig para mapansin mo ang mga palagay, tradeoff, at mahinang ebidensya.

entries.source: Debate this historical or philosophical claim from both sides. Separate evidence, assumptions, and values.
entries.value: Debatihin ang historical o philosophical na pahayag na ito mula sa dalawang panig. Paghiwalayin ang ebidensya, mga palagay, at mga pagpapahalaga.

entries.source: Debate through a chosen voice
entries.value: Makipagdebate gamit ang napiling boses

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI
entries.value: Debate Kasama ang Isang Personality Gamit ang AI

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Debate Kasama ang Isang Personality Gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Name isang totoo o fictional personality at debate sila sa anumang paksa. Ang AI channels kanilang pampubliko estilo at worldview habang keeping ang debate fair.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide
entries.value: Debate Kasama ang Isang Personality Gamit ang AI: praktikal gabay

entries.value: Magdisenyo ng sistema ng mga puntos, antas, quest, at gantimpala batay sa tunay na pag-unlad sa pag-aaral.

entries.value: Magdisenyo ng isang revision sprint

entries.value: Magdisenyo ng maliit na pang-araw-araw na review

entries.source: Design cues, reduce friction, track attempts, and recover from misses.
entries.value: Magdisenyo cues, reduce friction, track attempts, at recover mula sa misses.

entries.source: Design leaderboards that motivate without distorting learning.
entries.value: Magdisenyo leaderboards na motivate nang walang distorting pag-aaral.

entries.value: Diagnose at repair mga maling akala.

entries.value: Diagnose, suggest revisions, invite mag-aaral pagpili, at iterate.

entries.value: Pagsasanay sa Paglalagay ng Label sa Diagram

entries.value: Ginawa ang AI suriin iyong pangangatwiran instead ng simple replacing ito?

entries.source: Did you answer at least one question before reading the correction?
entries.value: Ginawa ikaw sagot at least isa tanong bago pagbabasa ang correction?

entries.source: Different jobs need different modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and more.
entries.value: Different mga gawain kailangan different mga mode: Socratic mga tanong, homework mga hint, mga flashcard, debate, kasaysayan roleplay, pagsusulat kritika, at mas marami.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: Different mga gawain sa pag-aaral kailangan different flows. Gamitin isang Homework Coach para sa mga hint, isang Math Hakbang Coach para sa problema paglutas, isang Socratic tutor para sa deep understanding, mga flashcard para sa recall, at mga quiz para sa pressure-tested pagsasanay.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Different mga gawain sa pag-aaral kailangan different interaction shapes, kaya inspir uses aktibo, mode-specific pagtuturo. Isang homework hint, Socratic tanong, pangkasaysayan simulation, flashcard repaso, at pagsusulat kritika dapat hindi behave like ang same generic chat.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: Different mga gawain sa pag-aaral kailangan different shapes: Socratic mga tanong, homework mga hint, mga flashcard, debate, kasaysayan roleplay, pagsusulat kritika, at pagpaplano ng pag-aaral.

entries.source: Different people need different AI learning routes.
entries.value: Different mga tao kailangan different AI pag-aaral mga ruta.

entries.source: Disallowed
entries.value: Disallowed

entries.source: Disclaimer Of Warranty
entries.value: Disclaimer Ng Warranty

entries.source: Disclosure of Data
entries.value: Disclosure ng Data

entries.value: Tumuklas ng mga landas na angkop sa iyo

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you.
entries.value: Discover mga landas na umangkop ikaw.

entries.source: Discovery
entries.value: Discovery

entries.source: Discovery is open where the content is public.
entries.value: Discovery ay Buksan kung saan ang content ay pampubliko.

entries.source: Dismiss language options
entries.value: Itago ang mga pagpipilian sa wika

entries.source: Distribution that started offline
entries.value: Distribution na started offline

entries.source: Diverge, cluster, choose, refine, and make the idea actionable.
entries.value: Diverge, cluster, pumili, refine, at Gumawa ng ang ideya actionable.

entries.source: DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims
entries.value: DMCA Notice at Procedure para sa Copyright Infringement Mga pahayag

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: Gawin Ako alam ano magsanay susunod?

entries.source: Do not accept a revised paragraph until you can explain why the revision is better.
entries.value: Huwag tanggapin ang nirebisang talata hangga't hindi mo naipapaliwanag kung bakit mas mabuti ang rebisyon.

entries.source: Do not act like a passive Q&A tutor or bury work in chat. Do not overpraise weak output. Keep the user as decision owner, preserve their voice in writing tasks, and end sessions with a concrete artifact or next action.
entries.value: Gawin hindi act like isang pasibo Q&Isang tutor o bury work sa chat. Gawin hindi overpraise mahina output. Keep ang user bilang decision owner, preserve kanilang voice sa pagsusulat mga gawain, at end mga session kasama ang isang concrete artifact o susunod action.

entries.source: Do not advance just because the learner clicked next. Require evidence, name misconceptions specifically, and repair weak links before moving on.
entries.value: Gawin hindi advance lang becaGamitin ang mag-aaral clicked susunod. Require ebidensya, name mga maling akala specifically, at repair mahina mga link bago paglipat sa.

entries.source: Do not amplify hateful or dangerous arguments. Reframe sensitive topics around evidence, ethics, and learning.
entries.value: Gawin hindi amplify hateful o dangerous mga argumento. Reframe sensitive mga paksa paligid ng ebidensya, etika, at pag-aaral.

entries.source: Do not ask for a complete summary before you know the prerequisite ideas.
entries.value: Huwag humingi ng kumpletong buod bago mo malaman ang mga kinakailangang ideya.

entries.source: Do not ask learners to run unsafe code. Explain security-sensitive code at a high level when needed.
entries.value: Gawin hindi magtanong mga mag-aaral sa run unsafe code. Ipaliwanag ang security-sensitive code at isang high antas kapag needed.

entries.source: Do not ask which product wins. Ask which learning behavior fits.
entries.value: Gawin hindi magtanong alin produkto wins. Magtanong alin asal sa pag-aaral umaangkop.

entries.source: Do not claim live verification without tools. Recommend checking primary sources for current facts.
entries.value: Gawin hindi pahayag live verification nang walang mga tool. Recommend pagsusuri primary mga source para sa kasalukuyan mga katotohanan.

entries.source: Do not complete graded work for the learner. Make them own the final response.
entries.value: Gawin hindi kumpleto graded work para sa ang mag-aaral. Gumawa ng sila own ang huli response.

entries.source: Do not confuse a fast answer with mastery.
entries.value: Gawin hindi confGamitin isang mabilis sagot kasama ang mastery.

entries.source: Do not debate only the side you already agree with.
entries.value: Huwag debatihin lang ang panig na sinasang-ayunan mo na.

entries.source: Do not ignore hesitation; uncertainty is a useful signal for review.
entries.value: Huwag balewalain ang pag-aatubili; ang kawalan ng katiyakan ay mahalagang senyales para sa pagrepaso.

entries.source: Do not invent bibliographic details. Mark unknown fields clearly.
entries.value: Gawin hindi invent bibliographic details. Mark hindi alam fields clearly.

entries.source: Do not invent citations. Clearly mark when source verification is needed.
entries.value: Gawin hindi invent citations. Clearly mark kapag source verification ay needed.

entries.source: Do not lecture by default, ask multiple questions, hide progress, or dump the answer too soon. Use hint ladders before explanations. If the learner asks for direct explanation, give it concisely and then require a final synthesis in their own words. For medical, legal, financial, or sensitive decisions, include appropriate caution and avoid pushing a hidden conclusion.
entries.value: Gawin hindi lecture ng default, magtanong multiple mga tanong, hide progress, o dump ang sagot too soon. Gamitin hint ladders bago mga paliwanag. Kung ang mag-aaral nagtatanong para sa direkta paliwanag, give ito concisely at pagkatapos require isang huli synthesis sa kanilang own mga salita. Para sa medical, legal, financial, o sensitive decisions, isama appropriate caution at avoid pushing isang nakatagong konklusyon.

entries.source: Do not let roleplay replace dates, context, documents, or evidence labels.
entries.value: Huwag hayaang palitan ng roleplay ang mga petsa, konteksto, dokumento, o label ng ebidensya.

entries.source: Do not make a plan that assumes every topic needs equal time.
entries.value: Huwag gumawa ng planong ipinapalagay na kailangan ng bawat paksa ng parehong oras.

entries.source: Do not make flashcards from sentences you still cannot explain in your own words.
entries.value: Huwag gumawa ng flashcard mula sa mga pangungusap na hindi mo pa kayang ipaliwanag sa sarili mong salita.

entries.source: Do not paste an assignment and ask for the finished response.
entries.value: Huwag mag-paste ng assignment at humingi ng tapos na sagot.

entries.source: Do not provide long copyrighted text. Work from user-provided excerpts or brief summaries.
entries.value: Gawin hindi magbigay long copyrighted text. Work mula sa user-provided excerpts o brief summaries.

entries.source: Do not provide therapy or crisis counseling. Encourage trusted human support for serious distress.
entries.value: Gawin hindi magbigay therapy o crisis counseling. Encourage trusted human suporta para sa serious distress.

entries.source: Do not reproduce long copyrighted passages. Summarize user-provided text.
entries.value: Gawin hindi reproduce long copyrighted passages. Ibuod ang user-provided text.

entries.source: Do not reread notes before testing what you can already recall.
entries.value: Huwag muling basahin ang notes bago subukan kung ano ang kaya mo nang maalala.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Gawin hindi Repasuhin everything equally

entries.source: Do not shame mistakes. For graded work, coach understanding rather than producing a submission.
entries.value: Gawin hindi shame mga pagkakamali. Para sa graded work, coach understanding rather kaysa producing isang submission.

entries.source: Do not skip showing what you already tried; the useful help depends on that context.
entries.value: Huwag laktawan ang pagpapakita ng nasubukan mo na; nakadepende sa kontekstong iyon ang kapaki-pakinabang na tulong.

entries.source: Do not stop after the first explanation; make yourself answer questions about it.
entries.value: Huwag tumigil pagkatapos ng unang paliwanag; pilitin mong sagutin ang mga tanong tungkol dito.

entries.source: Do not treat generated dialogue as a real quote or primary source.
entries.value: Huwag ituring ang nabuong dialogue bilang tunay na sipi o primary source.

entries.source: Do something with it
entries.value: Gumawa ng isang bagay gamit ito

entries.source: Do the comparison pages include private user chats?
entries.value: Gawin ang mga pahina ng paghahambing isama pribado user chats?

entries.source: Do these guides connect to live AI learning tools?
entries.value: Gawin mga ito mga gabay connect sa live AI pag-aaral mga tool?

entries.source: Do we have free will?
entries.value: Mayroon ba tayong malayang pagpapasya?

entries.source: Do you have a next route open: a mode, subject hub, workflow, or related guide?
entries.value: Gawin ikaw mayroon isang susunod ruta buksan: isang mode, hub ng paksa, workflow, o kaugnay gabay?

entries.source: Do you know which route to use next: a mode, prompt, subject hub, or related guide?
entries.value: Gawin ikaw alam alin ruta gamitin susunod: isang mode, prompt, hub ng paksa, o kaugnay gabay?

entries.source: Does inspir expose private homework chats to Google?
entries.value: Ginagawa inspir ipakita pribado homework chats sa Google?

entries.source: Does inspir publish a child's private chats?
entries.value: Ginagawa inspir maglathala isang bata's pribado chats?

entries.source: Does inspir support schools?
entries.value: Sinusuportahan ba ng inspir ang mga paaralan?

entries.source: Does this comparison include private user chats?
entries.value: Ginagawa ito paghahambing isama pribado user chats?

entries.source: Draft cards, test the learner, refine weak cards, and suggest review spacing.
entries.value: Draft mga card, Subukan ang mag-aaral, refine mahina mga card, at suggest Repasuhin spacing.

entries.source: Draw a supply-demand graph
entries.value: Gumuhit ng graph ng supply at demand

entries.source: Draw/Sketch Board
entries.value: Board para sa Pagguhit/Sketch

entries.source: due date
entries.value: due petsa

entries.source: Each article is written to help learners, parents, educators, and builders use AI for understanding, practice, and confidence.
entries.value: Bawat artikulo ay written sa tulong mga mag-aaral, mga magulang, educators, at mga builder Gamitin AI para sa understanding, pagsasanay, at confidence.

entries.source: Each audience path connects to public, crawlable learning surfaces.
entries.value: Bawat madla landas connects sa pampubliko, crawlable pag-aaral surfaces.

entries.source: Each category has its own search intent, live mode links, and guide structure so the library is useful to people and legible to search systems.
entries.value: Bawat category mayroon nito own search intent, live mode mga link, at gabay structure kaya ang aklatan ay kapaki-pakinabang sa mga tao at legible sa search systems.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Bawat paghahambing ay written sa maging fair, kapaki-pakinabang, at action-oriented: ano ang kilala tool ay mahusay para sa, kung saan ang inspir ay different, at alin pampubliko mode buksan una.

entries.source: Each guide ends with practice plans, routes, and links into the exact learning mode that fits.
entries.value: Nagtatapos ang bawat gabay sa mga plano sa pagsasanay, ruta, at link papunta sa eksaktong learning mode na angkop.

entries.source: Each hub is a crawlable subject guide, but it also sends learners straight into live guest-mode learning instead of stranding them on a brochure page.
entries.value: Bawat hub ay isang crawlable paksa gabay, pero ito also sends mga mag-aaral straight tungo sa live guest-mode pag-aaral instead ng stranding sila sa isang brochure pahina.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public URL so learners can arrive from search directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: Bawat pag-aaral mode mayroon isang pampubliko URL kaya mga mag-aaral Maaari bang arrive mula sa search directly inside ang tama karanasan sa pag-aaral.

entries.source: Each map card connects a real learner need to live modes, prompt starters, deeper guides, and a review loop. People can use it. Crawlers can understand it.
entries.value: Bawat mapa card connects isang totoo mag-aaral kailangan sa mga live mode, prompt starters, deeper mga gabay, at isang loop sa pagrepaso. Mga tao Maaari bang Gamitin ito. Crawlers Maaari bang understand ito.

entries.source: Each mode opens as a public guest chat with its own purpose, examples, and learning flow, so learners can start with the right kind of support immediately.
entries.value: Bawat mode ay bumubukas bilang pampublikong guest chat na may sariling layunin, halimbawa, at daloy ng pag-aaral, kaya agad makapagsisimula ang mga mag-aaral sa tamang uri ng suporta.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Bawat pahina mga link paghahambing intent sa mga live mode, mga gabay, mga prompt, at AI-readable discovery files.

entries.source: Each path connects the right public guest modes, prompts, and guides so learners can move from a search intent into a real practice loop.
entries.value: Bawat landas connects ang tama mga pampublikong guest mode, mga prompt, at mga gabay kaya mga mag-aaral Maaari bang lumipat mula sa isang search intent tungo sa isang totoo loop ng pagsasanay.

entries.source: Each phrase maps to the same practical workflow: choose a public mode, ask for active help, then review what changed.
entries.value: Bawat phrase maps sa ang same praktikal workflow: pumili isang pampubliko mode, Humingi ng aktibo tulong, pagkatapos Repasuhin ano changed.

entries.source: Each prompt opens the matching public mode, so a learner can move from search result to a focused study session quickly.
entries.value: Bawat prompt opens ang matching pampubliko mode, kaya isang mag-aaral Maaari bang lumipat mula sa search resulta sa isang nakapokus study session quickly.

entries.source: Each public mode has a different learning behavior, so every guide gives learners and search systems a clear explanation of when to use that mode, what to ask, and how to keep learning active.
entries.value: Bawat pampubliko mode mayroon isang different asal sa pag-aaral, kaya bawat gabay gives mga mag-aaral at search systems isang malinaw paliwanag ng kapag gamitin na mode, ano magtanong, at paano sa keep pag-aaral aktibo.

entries.source: Each route ends with explain-back, a quiz, a flashcard, a source check, or a study plan.
entries.value: Bawat ruta ends kasama ang explain-back, isang quiz, isang flashcard, isang source suriin, o isang study plano.

entries.source: Each step opens a live guest mode, so this is not a static guide. It is a route into practice, feedback, and review.
entries.value: Bawat hakbang opens isang live guest mode, kaya ito ay hindi isang static gabay. Ito ay isang ruta inmagsanay, feedback, at repaso.

entries.source: Each subject hub names the learning job, recommends the right focused modes, and shows how to finish with evidence of understanding instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: Bawat hub ng paksa names ang gawain sa pag-aaral, recommends ang tama nakapokus mga mode, at shows paano sa finish kasama ang ebidensya ng understanding instead ng pasibo answer-copying.

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: Madali. Push ito later.

entries.source: Economics Simulator
entries.value: Economics Simulator

entries.source: economics simulator AI
entries.value: AI economics simulator

entries.source: Economics Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Play with markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, and personal finance through simple simulations.
entries.value: Economics Simulator Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Play kasama ang markets, scarcity, incentives, polisiya, at personal finance sa pamamagitan ng simple simulations.

entries.source: Economics Simulator AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Economics Simulator Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI: praktikal gabay

entries.value: Pang-edukasyong Aplikasyon

entries.value: EducationalAudience

entries.value: Pang-edukasyong Organisasyon

entries.value: Mga epekto ng palimbagan

entries.source: End by writing the strongest claim and strongest counterclaim.
entries.value: End ng pagsusulat ang pinakamalakas pahayag at pinakamalakas counterclaim.

entries.source: End with a recap from memory.
entries.value: End kasama ang isang recap mula sa memory.

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas
entries.value: Mga Dilemma sa Etika

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Work through dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Etika Dilemmas Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Work sa pamamagitan ng dilemmas ng weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, mga karapatan, at tradeoffs.

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Etika Dilemmas Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI: praktikal gabay

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas prompts and study loop
entries.value: Etika Dilemmas mga prompt at loop sa pag-aaral

entries.source: Evaluate a mode before using it with learners
entries.value: Suriin isang mode bago gamit ang ito kasama ang mga mag-aaral

entries.source: Evaluate a public AI learning layer first, then explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, content alignment, and usage funding.
entries.value: Suriin isang pampubliko AI pag-aaral layer una, pagkatapos Galugarin ang custom mga workflow, pagiging kumpidensyal kailangan, content alignment, at usage funding.

entries.source: Evaluate articles, claims, videos, or posts for evidence, bias, reliability, and missing context.
entries.value: Suriin ang mga artikulo, claim, video, o post para sa ebidensya, bias, pagiging maaasahan, at mga kulang na konteksto.

entries.source: Evaluate evidence, author, motive, corroboration, and missing perspectives.
entries.value: Suriin ebidensya, author, motive, corroboration, at missing perspectives.

entries.source: Every article connects to categories, live modes, subject hubs, learning paths, and related guides.
entries.value: Bawat artikulo ay nakakonekta sa mga kategorya, live mode, subject hub, learning path, at kaugnay na gabay.

entries.source: Every article in this topic cluster.
entries.value: Bawat artikulo sa ito paksa cluster.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: Bawat core pag-aaral mode mayroon isang pampubliko guest entrypoint kaya mga tao Maaari bang magsimula mula sa search, social, o isang shared link.

entries.source: Every guide, path, subject hub, and prompt route is connected so learners and AI systems can understand the map.
entries.value: Bawat gabay, path, subject hub, at prompt route ay magkakaugnay para maunawaan ng mga mag-aaral at AI system ang mapa.

entries.source: Every indexable guest learning chat, organized by teaching behavior and learning need.
entries.value: Bawat indexable guest pag-aaral chat, organized ng pagtuturo behavior at pag-aaral kailangan.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Bawat link here ay pampubliko at crawlable. Pribado user chats stay out ng paghahambing, sitemap, at AI-readable discovery files.

entries.source: Every non-app page now has a job: build trust, explain the learning route, and send learners toward a useful next action without hiding the important details.
entries.value: May tungkulin na ngayon ang bawat non-app page: bumuo ng tiwala, ipaliwanag ang learning route, at dalhin ang mga mag-aaral sa kapaki-pakinabang na susunod na aksyon nang hindi itinatago ang mahahalagang detalye.

entries.source: Every public inspir mode has its own guest URL, examples, and teaching behavior, so learners can arrive directly from search and begin in the right flow.
entries.value: Bawat pampubliko inspir mode mayroon nito own guest URL, mga halimbawa, at pagtuturo behavior, kaya mga mag-aaral Maaari bang arrive directly mula sa search at magsimula sa ang tama flow.

entries.source: Every public learning mode has guides and prompt loops.
entries.value: Bawat pampubliko pag-aaral mode mayroon mga gabay at prompt mga loop.

entries.source: Every public mode is a doorway into a different learning behavior, so the format can match the job instead of forcing every learner into one generic chat box.
entries.value: Bawat pampubliko mode ay isang doorway tungo sa isang different asal sa pag-aaral, kaya ang format Maaari bang match ang gawain instead ng forcing bawat mag-aaral tungo sa isa generic chat box.

entries.source: Every subject page connects content to action.
entries.value: Bawat paksa pahina connects content sa action.

entries.source: Every workflow below is hand-linked to public pages: a path when one exists, the best live modes, prompt starters, related guides, and a review rhythm.
entries.value: Bawat workflow below ay hand-linked sa mga pampublikong pahina: isang landas kapag isa exists, ang pinakamahusay mga live mode, prompt starters, mga kaugnay na gabay, at isang Repasuhin rhythm.

entries.source: EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, YOU WILL HOLD US AND OUR OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS HARMLESS FOR ANY INDIRECT, PUNITIVE, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGE, HOWEVER IT ARISES (INCLUDING ATTORNEYS’ FEES AND ALL RELATED COSTS AND EXPENSES OF LITIGATION AND ARBITRATION, OR AT TRIAL OR ON APPEAL, IF ANY, WHETHER OR NOT LITIGATION OR ARBITRATION IS INSTITUTED), WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE, OR OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, OR ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THIS AGREEMENT, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION ANY CLAIM FOR PERSONAL INJURY OR PROPERTY DAMAGE, ARISING FROM THIS AGREEMENT AND ANY VIOLATION BY YOU OF ANY FEDERAL, STATE, OR LOCAL LAWS, STATUTES, RULES, OR REGULATIONS, EVEN IF COMPANY HAS BEEN PREVIOUSLY ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGE. EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, IF THERE IS LIABILITY FOUND ON THE PART OF COMPANY, IT WILL BE LIMITED TO THE AMOUNT PAID FOR THE PRODUCTS AND/OR SERVICES, AND UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES WILL THERE BE CONSEQUENTIAL OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. SOME STATES DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OR LIMITATION OF PUNITIVE, INCIDENTAL OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, SO THE PRIOR LIMITATION OR EXCLUSION MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU.
entries.value: EXCEPT bilang PROHIBITED ng batas, ikaw magiging HOLD amin at aming OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, at AGENTS HARMLESS para sa anumang INDIRECT, PUNITIVE, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, o CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGE, HOWEVER ito ARISES (INCLUDING ATTORNEYS’ FEES at lahat kaugnay COSTS at EXPENSES ng LITIGATION at ARBITRATION, o AT TRIAL o sa APPEAL, kung anumang, kung o hindi LITIGATION o ARBITRATION ay INSTITUTED), kung sa isang ACTION ng CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE, o OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, o ARISING OUT ng o sa CONNECTION kasama ang ito AGREEMENT, INCLUDING nang walang LIMITATION anumang pahayag para sa personal INJURY o property DAMAGE, ARISING mula sa ito AGREEMENT at anumang VIOLATION ng ikaw ng anumang FEDERAL, estado, o LOCAL mga batas, STATUTES, RULES, o REGULATIONS, EVEN kung Kompanya mayroon naging PREVIOUSLY ADVISED ng ang POSSIBILITY ng SUCH DAMAGE. EXCEPT bilang PROHIBITED ng batas, kung THERE ay LIABILITY FOUND sa ang PART ng Kompanya, ito magiging maging LIMITED sa ang AMOUNT PAID para sa ang PRODUCTS at/OR mga serbisyo, at sa ilalim ng NO CIRCUMSTANCES magiging THERE maging CONSEQUENTIAL o PUNITIVE DAMAGES. SOME STATES gawin hindi payagan ang EXCLUSION o LIMITATION ng PUNITIVE, INCIDENTAL o CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, kaya ang PRIOR LIMITATION o EXCLUSION MAY hindi APPLY sa ikaw.

entries.source: Explain My Answer
entries.value: Ipaliwanag ang Aking Sagot

entries.source: Explain My Answer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Ipaliwanag ang Aking Sagot Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Paste isang tanong, iyong sagot, at ang expected sagot kung ikaw mayroon ito. Iyong buddy ipinapaliwanag ang pangangatwiran at tumutulong ikaw avoid ang same pagkakamali susunod oras.
